results.title: ACME.BOT: No-slop AI SEO agent that interviews you first
results.content:
At the heart of ACME.BOT is Human-In-The-Loop mechanic that drives the whole blog writing process collaboratively with low friction. So you step in only where you are genuniely irreplacable. Let ACME.BOT handle the rest.

Our initial set of users loved our features (like interviews, diagrams, deep research, run from phone).

Excited to be launching it here today!

As a part of our PH launch week we're offering free trials (no CC required) to everyone from PH. Sign up for the free trial here.

@aditya\_harish\_2002  Thanks - that's exactly the bet we made.  
  
Keyword-first tools converge on the same SERP summary because they all start from the same inputs. The interview is the only input your competitors can't have.  
  
On the GitHub connector: yes - we have a review gate that waits for your feedback (as configured). Also drafts land in your repo as a pull request, so your existing review flow is the approval gate. Edit in the PR, request changes, merge when ready. Nothing goes live until the merge. ACME.BOT's own approval gates still apply upstream (before the PR is even opened) if you want a check earlier in the pipeline

Report

Clemente Lopez

AI Workflow Automation

Hipocampus is a workflow-ownership layer for teams. It deploys governed operators that automate and own team workflows across fragmented systems, with persistent workflow state, approvals, delegation, escalation, and shared context so work keeps moving across tools and time.

results.title: Lindy Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
#### vs Alternatives

I really like the simplicity and support from the team (the Slack has been a huge boon)

Sruthi Angel

#### What's great

I like how Lindy focuses on acting as a true AI assistant that can perform tasks across different tools instead of just generating responses. The ability to automate workflows and handle real actions makes it feel closer to a practical everyday assistant.

#### What needs improvement

It would be helpful to better understand how Lindy manages complex multi-step workflows and maintains accuracy when handling different integrations.

#### vs Alternatives

I explored other AI assistants and automation tools, but Lindy stood out due to its focus on cross-tool actions and real task execution.

Kimberly Charron

#### What's great [...] SURYA PRATAP SINGH

#### What's great

Really impressed by how this product turns a high-level goal into a multi-step workflow. The autonomous execution and practical use case make it a strong example of agentic AI.

Anton [...] #### What needs improvement

The built-in AI that builds or fixes workflows for you sometimes doesn’t hit the mark. Be sure to make a duplicate of your build first before using the AI to make fixes.

#### vs Alternatives

I believe Lindy, with its no-code interface and pre-built library of workflows is the most accessible AI agent tool for me and my clients.

Ghost Kitty

#### What's great

Wow, I love how simple Lindy makes marketing experiments. I've wasted hours building manual tests before. Being able to launch 1000s in minutes honestly sounds like a dream for small teams like mine trying to scale efficiently.

SURYA PRATAP SINGH

#### What's great
